mapper.sql: id, customer_code, customer_name, category, email, phone, status
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer WHERE is_deleted = FALSE
AND ( LOWER(customer_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(customer_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(category) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(status) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') )
SELECT FROM customer WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM customer WHERE customer_code = #{customerCode} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer (tenant_id, customer_code, customer_name, category, email, phone, status) VALUES (1, #{customerCode}, #{customerName}, #{category}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE customer SET customer_code = #{request.customerCode}, customer_name = #{request.customerName}, category = #{request.category}, email = #{request.email}, phone = #{request.phone}, status = #{request.status}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE customer SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
